title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What do you usually do in the evenings or at weekends?
Have you been to the cinema recently? What did you see?
Do you prefer going out with friends or spending time at home?
What's the best way to spend a day off for you?
Do you prefer to relax by doing something active or something quiet?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think people today have enough time for leisure and relaxation?
Is it important to do things that are completely different from your work in your free time?
Do you think technology has changed the way people enjoy their leisure time for better or worse?
